title: Replace with one bounded observed development

source_refs.locator: Replace with exact section, page, selector, or path and lines

freshness.reason: Dynamic page without a public content hash

observed_fact: Replace with the smallest fact the source directly establishes.
does_not_prove: Replace with capability, custody, retention, training, intent, and generalization limits.
confirmation_tests: Name evidence that would confirm the larger hypothesis.
falsifiers: Name evidence that would weigh against or resolve the larger hypothesis benignly.
